settings.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our stores, services, and how it all works.

settings.question: What is a Shopify Pre-Made Store?
settings.answer: A Shopify Pre-Made Store is a fully designed, ready-to-launch eCommerce store built on Shopify. It comes pre-loaded with products, supplier connections, and essential integrations so you can start selling immediately — no technical skills required.

settings.question: How is this different from a Shopify template?
settings.answer: Templates give you a blank design. Our stores give you a complete business foundation — products loaded, suppliers connected, navigation structured, policies set up, and branding ready. You're not starting from zero.

settings.question: Do I need technical knowledge?
settings.answer: No. Our stores are designed to be user-friendly. We handle all the technical setup, and Shopify's intuitive platform makes ongoing management simple.

settings.question: How soon can I start selling?
settings.answer: Typically within a few business days. After purchase, we contact you within 24 hours, handle the setup and transfer, and you're ready to go live.

settings.question: Do I fully own the store?
settings.answer: Yes. Once purchased, you have complete ownership — the domain, store, products, branding, and all settings are fully yours.

settings.question: Is this a one-time payment?
settings.answer: Yes. All our stores are sold as a one-time payment with no ongoing subscriptions to Shoplane. Note that Shopify itself has its own separate monthly subscription for hosting your store.

settings.question: Can I customise the store after purchase?
settings.answer: Absolutely. You can change branding, add or remove products, adjust pricing, connect your own suppliers, and modify the design — it's your store.

settings.question: What's your refund policy?
settings.answer: We offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If you're not happy, contact us within 30 days for a refund. Refunds require reversal of any delivered work.

settings.question: Do you offer ongoing support?
settings.answer: Yes. All stores include initial support and guidance. For ongoing maintenance, we offer our Store Care Program with 3, 6, or 9-month plans.

settings.question: Can I preview the store before buying?
settings.answer: Yes! Every store has a live preview link on its product page. You can explore the exact store you'll receive before making a purchase.

settings.heading: Still Have Questions?
settings.subheading: Book a free call and we'll walk you through everything.
